commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Codex app-server timeout handling so completion-watch idle timeouts can return Codex-specific user text and sanitized structural diagnostics while leaving non-completion watch timeouts on the generic path.

PR surface: Source +94, Tests +47, Docs +4. Total +145 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source and focused PR tests show the current completion-watch timeout path can end with generic timeout surfacing and no structural diagnostics after retry exhaustion; I did not execute the tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should confirm the additive exported diagnostics field is an intentional harness runtime contract; no ClawSweeper code repair is needed.
